faq-subscriber-invoices-q: How do I view my invoices and past charges?
faq-subscriber-invoices-a: All TailorKit charges are billed through Shopify. View detailed invoices, charge history, and download receipts directly in your Shopify Admin → Settings → Billing.
faq-subscriber-payment-method-q: How do I update my payment method?
faq-subscriber-payment-method-a: Payment methods are managed by Shopify, not TailorKit. Update your card or billing address in Shopify Admin → Settings → Billing → Payment methods.
faq-subscriber-ai-credits-q: How do I buy more AI credits?
faq-subscriber-ai-credits-a: Click "Buy more credits" in the AI credits section of your Billing card to purchase additional credits at any time. Purchased credits never expire.

add-slots-to-define-capacity: Add slots first to define capacity.
charm-builder-intro-body: Let customers add accessories (charms, pendants, stickers) to your product.
other-settings-appear-after-first-charm: Other settings appear after you add at least one charm.
if-tailorkit-has-been-useful-an-honest-s: If TailorKit has been useful for your store, an honest review on the Shopify App Store helps other merchants decide.
allow-customers-to-order-multiple-units-: Allow customers to order multiple units and personalize each unit with different text or images in a single Add to Cart.
hard-cap-on-units-per-add-to-cart-action: Hard cap on units per Add to Cart action. Default 50.
visible-label-shown-on-each-cart-line-it: Visible label shown on each cart line item. Use {index} for unit number and {total} for total count. Example: Trophy {index} of {total}.
tip-include-index-and-total-placeholders: Tip: include {index} and {total} placeholders for clearer cart labels.
customer-personalized-each-unit-individu: Customer personalized each unit individually. See per-unit details below.
showing-the-buyer-cart-preview-print-fil: Showing the buyer cart preview. Print file could not be generated, likely because a referenced image is missing.
global-emoji-picker-description: Pick a font and a master emoji set once for the whole shop, then click "Apply to all templates" to push the same set onto every text layer that already has the emoji picker enabled. Per-template tweaks are still made in the template editor.
apply-emojis-confirm-title: Apply this emoji set to all templates?
apply-emojis-confirm-body: This will replace the emoji list on every text layer that has the emoji picker enabled, across every template in your shop. Templates where the emoji picker is off will not be touched. You can still customise individual layers from the template editor afterwards.
apply-emojis-failed: Could not apply the emoji set. Please try again.
